---
description: Bare lambda extracted to named FLET function
inspector: check-bare-lambda
finding: bare-lambda-finding
maintainer: fix-bare-lambda
resolution: syntax-resolution
---
(mapcar (lambda (x) (1+ x)) items)
---
(:severity :style)
---
(flet ((map-item (x)
         (1+ x)))
  (mapcar #'map-item items))
---
